Sponsorship

Maison Rouge sponsor of your events

We are proud to support culture, sport and leisure

Jumping Sion

Until 2018, we supported Jumping Sion and its equestrian competitions that require elegance and precision from horses and their riders. Two strong values for our company.

Lucie Moreillon

Maison Rouge encourages young people in their passions and helps them achieve their goals, such as Lucie Moreillon, national A-level pony dressage rider in 2018.

FC Conthey

Since 2018, we have contributed to the integration and development of Valais youth through sport by supporting FC Conthey. The values of football such as solidarity, team spirit and openness to the world are also those of our company.

Jonathan Hirschi - Rallye International Valais

In 2015, we embarked and travelled the roads alongside Swiss driver Jonathan Hirschi for the Rallye International du Valais. A human adventure that will remain etched in our memories.

SPAS - Seaplane Pilots Association Switzerland
